name: Pisang Goreng (Sauteed Bananas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the bananas and slice them lengthwise, then in half crosswise.
2. Heat the butter in a large skillet until it begins to bubble but does not brown.
3. Place the banana slices cut-side down in the hot butter when ready.
4. Saute the bananas for about two minutes on each side, turning once, until golden.
5. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately.
